title: User Login with Email and Password
description: Users must be able to log in using their registered email and password

title: User Registration Flow
description: New users can register with email, name and password with email verification

title: Push Notification Support
description: App sends push notifications for key events like task assignments

title: Checkout Payment Integration
description: Users can complete purchase using credit card via payment gateway

title: Responsive Dashboard Layout
description: Dashboard adapts to mobile, tablet and desktop viewports

title: Search and Filter Products
description: Users can search products by name and filter by category

title: Order History Page
description: Users can view their past orders with status and details

title: Password Reset via Email
description: Users can reset forgotten passwords via email link

title: Password testing on login page
description:
Password Requirements:
At least 12 characters long
Must include uppercase and lowercase letters
Must include at least one number
Must include at least one symbol (e.g., !@#$%^&*)
Cannot contain any part of your full name

title: Contact Number
description:
Requirements:
Length minimum 3, maximum 15
After country cannot enter 0
No symbols allowed
Existing number not allowed

title: Login username now need to use email only
description:
Requirements:
Email only allowed
Format email only

title: To check on Sector Information Pre Quota
description:
Requirements:
Ensure all Case-by-case sector is shown
Ensure all Case-by-case sub sector is shown
Ensure all Case-by-case job category is shown
Ensure all Case-by-case industry is shown when sector is Mining and Quarrying
Ensure all Case-by-case company type is shown when sector is Manufacturing
